headline: Raymond James (NYSE:RJF) Reports Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Financial services firm Raymond James Financial (NYSE:RJF) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 25.2% year on year to $4.26 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.83 per share was 2.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Raymond James Financial (RJF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +2.69% and +2.95%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Raymond James Financial Inc (NYSE:RJF) Reports Q2 2026 Earnings Beat, Revenue Miss
summary: Raymond James Q2 2026 earnings beat EPS estimates at $2.83, while revenue of $3.86B slightly missed forecasts. Record client assets and strong segment growth highlighted the quarter.

headline: Raymond James Earnings Beat Forecasts. The Stock Is Falling.
summary: Raymond James Financial  reported fiscal second-quarter adjusted net income and revenue that beat Wall Street forecasts thanks to growth in asset-management fees.  The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $2.83, higher than analyst forecasts of $2.76, according to FactSet.  For the same period a year ago, Raymond James reported adjusted earnings of $2.42.
